title: graduation_readiness_check
description: ACP graduation readiness assessment. Lite tier: metadata + schema validation. Full tier: live ACP test fires with real job execution.

offering_name.description: Name of the ACP offering to check

tier.description: Assessment tier: lite ($0.01, metadata only) or full ($1.00, live test fires)

ready.description: Whether the offering is ready for graduation

blockers.description: Critical issues that must be fixed before graduation

warnings.description: Non-critical issues that should be addressed
